name: Texas Cowpoke Pintos
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Ground Garlic or 4 Pods Crushed Fresh Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash beans thoroughly and discard any bad ones or rocks.
2. Place beans in a pot and cover with water. Bring to a boil.
3. Pour out the water and return the beans to the pot, adding fresh water to cover 2 to 3 inches (use 2 inches for a thicker sauce).
4. Add all other ingredients except salt.
5. Bring to a boil again and reduce to simmer.
6. If cooking in a crockpot, allow 8 to 10 hours; on the stove, about 6 hours.
7. Season with salt during the last hour if needed, continuing to cook until done.
8. Makes about 10 servings. Can be frozen for later use as frijoles refrito.
